summary: Completed testing of Card Detail Modal enhancements (binder selector and price history chart). Backend: 9/10 tests passed. Frontend: All features working correctly. Found 1 backend bug: Cannot remove card from binder (setting binder_id to null doesn't work).

minor.issue: Cannot set binder_id to null to remove card from binder. When sending binder_id: null, the backend doesn't update the field because Pydantic converts null to None (the default value), and the check 'if data.binder_id is not None' fails.
minor.fix_suggestion: Use a sentinel value or check if 'binder_id' key exists in the raw request body to distinguish between 'not provided' and 'explicitly set to null'

passed_tests: Backend: PUT /api/cards/:id with binder_id updates card's binder
Backend: Child cannot update card binder (403)
Backend: PUT /api/cards/:id with price adds to price_history
Backend: Trevenant has multiple price history entries (6 entries)
Backend: Porygon2 has single price history entry
Backend: GET /api/cards includes price_history field
Backend: GET /api/cards includes binder_id field
Backend: PUT /api/cards/:id with condition updates correctly
Backend: PUT /api/cards/:id with quantity updates correctly
Frontend: Admin login shows dashboard with cards
Frontend: Card detail modal shows binder selector (CLASSEUR dropdown) for admin
Frontend: Binder selector shows 'Aucun classeur' + all binders as options
Frontend: Admin can change binder assignment from card detail modal
Frontend: Toast message 'Classeur mis à jour !' appears after binder change
Frontend: Card detail modal shows price history chart for Trevenant (4+ entries)
Frontend: Price history chart displays bars with dates (hover shows price and date)
Frontend: Card detail modal does NOT show price history chart for Porygon2 (1 entry)
Frontend: Child account card detail does NOT show binder selector
Frontend: Child account card detail does NOT show delete button
Frontend: Child account card detail does NOT show edit price button
Frontend: Child account shows 'Super carte !' button instead of 'Fermer'
Frontend: Classeurs view shows correct card count per binder
Frontend: Binder filter on collection view works correctly
failed_tests: Backend: test_remove_card_from_binder - Cannot set binder_id to null
action_items: Fix PUT /api/cards/:id to properly handle binder_id: null (remove card from binder)
critical_code_review_comments: Backend CardUpdate model: The Optional[str] = None pattern doesn't distinguish between 'field not provided' and 'field explicitly set to null'. Consider using a sentinel value or checking raw request body.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing Trevenant and Porygon2 cards
context_for_next_testing_agent: Card detail modal features (binder selector, price history chart) are working. Trevenant has 6+ price history entries and is assigned to 'Mes Préférées' binder. Porygon2 has 1 price entry. The only issue is backend cannot handle setting binder_id to null to remove a card from a binder. Frontend correctly sends null but backend ignores it.

features_verified.binder_selector_in_modal: Admin sees CLASSEUR dropdown with 'Aucun classeur' + all binders
features_verified.binder_change_from_modal: Admin can change binder, toast shows 'Classeur mis à jour !'
features_verified.price_history_chart: Shows bar chart when card has >1 price history entries
features_verified.price_history_hover: Hovering on bars shows price and date
features_verified.child_restrictions: Child cannot see binder selector, delete button, or edit price button
features_verified.classeurs_view_counts: Shows correct card count and value per binder

rca_of_the_issue.issue: Cannot remove card from binder (set binder_id to null)
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: In server.py line 538, the check 'if data.binder_id is not None' fails when binder_id is explicitly set to null because Pydantic converts JSON null to Python None, which is the same as the default value
reproduction_steps: 2. Open card detail modal for a card assigned to a binder
4. The frontend sends PUT /api/cards/:id with binder_id: null
5. Backend receives the request but doesn't update binder_id because the check fails
rca_of_the_issue.mitigation: Fix the backend to use model_fields_set or check raw request body to detect if binder_id was explicitly provided
